zh.title: 以赛亚预言全集 - 旧约先知书预言与验证 | Isaiah Prophecies
zh.description: 旧约先知以赛亚（约公元前740-700年活跃）的预言完整收录，涵盖弥赛亚预言（以马内利、受苦仆人）、列国审判、新天新地等异象。含历史验证与学术分析。
zh.keywords: 以赛亚,以赛亚书,旧约预言,弥赛亚预言,以马内利,受苦仆人,先知以赛亚,圣经预言,以赛亚预言验证
zh.ogTitle: 以赛亚预言全集 | Isaiah Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 旧约先知以赛亚的预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖弥赛亚预言、列国审判、末世异象等领域。
zh.twitterDescription: 旧约先知以赛亚的预言全集，含弥赛亚预言、列国审判与验证分析。以马内利、受苦仆人、新天新地等经典预言。

en.title: Isaiah Prophecies - Old Testament Prophetic Book: Messianic Visions & Verification
en.description: Complete archive of Prophet Isaiah's prophecies (~740-700 BC), including messianic predictions (Immanuel, Suffering Servant), judgment on nations, and visions of new heavens and earth. With historical verification and scholarly analysis.
en.keywords: Isaiah,Book of Isaiah,Old Testament prophecy,messianic prophecy,Immanuel,Suffering Servant,Prophet Isaiah,Bible prophecy,Isaiah verification
en.ogTitle: Isaiah Prophecies - Complete Old Testament Prophetic Archive
en.ogDescription: Complete archive of Prophet Isaiah's prophecies with historical verification. Messianic visions, judgment on nations, and eschatological prophecies.
en.twitterDescription: Prophet Isaiah's prophecies: Immanuel, Suffering Servant, fall of Babylon, new heavens and earth. Historical verification and scholarly analysis.
